title: Juice It or Lose It
creator: Martin Jonasson and Petri Purho
description: A plain Breakout clone is transformed step by step with animation, particles, sound, camera effects, and physical exaggeration.
useful: The short format makes it easy to connect each polish technique to the change it produces on screen.
audience: Students and prototype developers who want a fast introduction to game feel.
learning: Identify small effects that strengthen an action
Layer sound, animation, particles, and camera feedback
Evaluate polish without changing a game's core rules

editorial.note: Kept as a concise standalone companion to The Art of Screenshake; the visual-direction path uses the latter to avoid two near-duplicate demonstrations in sequence.
